title: Youmind 16166 Youmind 16166
prompt: {argument name="garment" default="[GARMENT]"} captured at the millisecond of controlled unraveling, threads pulled taut and suspended mid-air, seams splitting in slow motion, fabric folding back on itself to reveal raw selvage edges and lining beneath. The intact garment still visible at center, surrounded by its own dissolution. Every suspended thread and floating fabric fragment labeled with a hair-thin line: "{argument name="component" default="[COMPONENT]"}  [fiber content, thread count, tension at break point]". Background: deep charcoal. Single overhead spot, threads catching light like spun silver. Garment name "{argument name="name" default="[NAME]"}" in fractured letterpress type at top. Subtitle: "[TAGLINE]". Mood: Harold Edgerton freeze-frame meets Yohji Yamamoto deconstruction. 4K, tack sharp, violent and beautiful.
